reviews.review_description: My favorite part was trudging through the snow. Reminded me instantly of The Thing and made me excited to adventure into the facility. There are a lot of improvements to touch on but I will keep it short. A quick way to make the game more interesting would be to add documents and other notes to discover. You could build tension and curiosity with this simple element. If you provide an email address I would be happy to share more feedback with you. Terrific effort so far!

developer_response.body: Thanks Cj.Mcilroy! I would love to hear your ideas and I am working on pickable objects and puzzles to give more depth.. not just scares :) Please send me a facebook message @moonfoxgames. Looking forward to your ideas! Thanks, Moonfox Games

reviews.review_description: Though a good idea of a game it sucks for not having full gamepad support. The gun controls are very poor. Please fix asap

developer_response.body:
Hi Rabksaj, Thanks for the reviewing the game and the feedback! It doesn't support gamepads as the game description says. Try playing with gear VR controller or touchpad and see if its better as the game design with them in mind not gamepad. I apologise again for the issue and will find a way to implement to finally gamepad support. If you have any other ideas for chapter 2, feel free to send a message on facebook @moonfoxgames. Thanks, Moonfox Games!

UPDATE:
Hi Rabksaj, Did you have time to try it with the Gear VR controller or touchpad? Would love to hear your feedback. Anyway, I'll keep you posted when the Gamepad support is done :)

reviews.review_title: Might have been intentional on my part.
reviews.review_description: Fell off the side of the map so I didn't see any zombies.
A few of the jumpscares were weak, but I still got scared a decent amount of times! The overall gameplay is very good.

developer_response.body: Thanks MickeeM! Currently working on better scares for chapter 2 ;-) If you have any ideas or improvements for chapter 2, please feel free to send a message on facebook @moonfoxgames. Thanks Moonfox Games

reviews.review_description: Really love it, very atmospheric.. Just started playing it, but got killed as I had the gun but no bullets! Update. Found them. This is a great game guys. Reminds me also of the 2013 movie The Colony, and also The Thing... Brilliant!

developer_response.body: Hi Maccyb123, Glad you enjoyed the game and yes, it was inspired by the Thing. I will check out the Colony! If you have any ideas how to improve the game, please feel free to facebook me @moonfoxgames. Thanks ​Moonfox Games.

reviews.review_description: Poorly designed/ made. Mechanics seemed borrowed from other games and just crudely added to this. Examples are the gun and door animations. Would not recommend. - I feel bad giving it a low review because it seems it was made by one person who took a lot of time to make this, if that's the case, then keep going. This is a great start, keep making games because you have great potential for!

developer_response.body:
UPDATE:
Hi Aidan, Re-designed the door animations and gun usage for you to make the experience more immersive. Please check it out and let me know what you think. It would be great to get more in-depth feedback from you if you have the time on facebook @moonfoxgames.

Thanks, 
Moonfox Games

PREVIOUS:
Hi Aidan, Thanks for the feedback as I want to improve the game and yes I do this by myself. I am not sure what you mean about the door and gun animation I designed but I would love to hear your feedback and any other tips. You can send a message on facebook @moonfoxgames if you have the time to explain :). Thanks Moonfox Games

reviews.review_title: Crashed at crucial point in game.
reviews.review_description: I didn't find it particularly scary but it does have a good atmosphere. The graphics are basic and suffer from screen redrawing but are acceptable. The gun is very awkward to use especially the reholstering. However I got to what seemed like a climax in the game with my gun at the ready, when it crashed. It completely ruined the experience and I am unlikely to start the game again from scratch.

developer_response.body:
Update

Hi Gadgetonomy, I can't recreate the crash issue and is likely due to overheating as it does happen in most vr games. If you could provide more details where and how it occured that would be great! Thanks Moonfox Games

Hi Gadgetonomy, Thanks reviewing and I apologise for the crash. Someone else had the same issue of the crash today which must be a bug from the last update. Also the game save automatically and you will be able to restart from the lift. Trying to provide movement and a gun at the same time is a bit awkward I know but If you have any ideas how to improve it, please send me a facebook message @moonfoxgames! Thanks, Moonfox Games

reviews.review_description: Developer fixed issue where the game wouldn't install on the s9 after the android 9 update. Back to being a great game
I found it too slow (to move around), too restricted (in what I can see and what I can do), and too boring. Perhaps it's just not for me, but horror (i.e., jump scare) lovers might enjoy it.

developer_response.body: Hi Funking, Thanks for the feedback and sorry that you did not enjoy the game.  If you want to provide more feedback, feel free to message me @moonfoxgames on facebook. Thanks, Moonfox Games

reviews.review_title: Gamepad support would make it a 5
reviews.review_description: Any word on gamepad support for this title? The movement is not as bad as Demongrade( head tilting to move makes absolutely no sense) it would be much better with gamepad support.
Will this game come out for the oculus quest

Doesn't support other controllers. Which is a pain when you've spent £50 on a decent one.

Tried with the official Samsung controller for occulus gear vr but I found that to be a bit clumsy, probably a fault of the controller not the app though.

Developer says he will update the app to hopefully support the Steel Series Xl controller.

After my galaxsy s9+ was upgraded to android 9.. the game uninstalled and won't be installed again.
Now, the developer updated the app and it is working wonderfully. Thanks
Very scary

But needs gamepad support with rotation and although the graphics are decent lease in my opinion. it can still use some improvement, polishing, resolution etc. other than that its still a good horror game and it kinda reminds me of the movie The Thing.
I downloaded the game just because I notice how much you guys value the opinion of the consumers so I downloaded it and about to play it right after I hit (submit)

developer_response.body: Thanks TrioEremy for noticing :) Trying to implement or fix whatever recommendation or issues everyone bring ​up.​. It helps make the game so much better! I hope you enjoyed the game and If you have any other ideas for chapter 2, feel free to send a message on facebook @moonfoxgames. Thanks again, Moonfox Games!

reviews.review_description: Great game but stuck were do I get bullets from can't find anywhere help

developer_response.body: Hi Stephen, the bullets are found further in the game. There will be an update in a couple of weeks which will make it easier to get ammo. If you have any ideas to improve the game, feel free to message @moonfoxgames on facebook. Thanks, Moonfox Games

reviews.review_description: It was ok but short
Can't open the gate
Great and scary game 0_0  keep up good work guys :)

developer_response.body: Thanks Brokensword101! Glad you found it scary :) If you have any other ideas for chapter 2, feel free to send a message on facebook @moonfoxgames. Thanks, Moonfox Games!
